_comments.usage: To run the DSLD cleaning script with this config:
alternatives: python clean_dsld_data.py (uses this config by default when in scripts/ dir)

processing._comment: batch_size controls files per batch, max_workers controls parallel processes

output_format._comment: JSON formatting - pretty_print=true for development, false for production
output_format._help: true = human-readable indented JSON (2x size), false = minified single-line (50% smaller)

logging._comment: Logs are written as timestamped files: logs/dsld_cleaning_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.log

validation._comment: Required fields are defined in constants.py (REQUIRED_FIELDS). This section is for reference only.

options._comment: These options are passed via CLI (--resume, --dry-run), kept for documentation
